origin: Based on 農民曆工廠 0331 card_main model appearance
role: EP53 喝茶與長壽 — 真人主持人角色（Seedance 影片用）

face.shape: gentle square jaw, soft contour, delicate bone structure
face.skin: porcelain-clear, dewy glass skin, warm undertone, no blemishes
face.eyes: gentle downturned almond eyes, soft double eyelids, dark brown iris
face.brows: fluffy natural textured brows, slightly arched
face.lips: subtle pout, soft gradient glossy lips, natural pink-peach tone

hair.style: loose natural waves, center-parted, tucked behind one ear

makeup.base: dewy glass skin, minimal foundation, natural glow
makeup.lips: gradient glossy lips, peach-to-rose, no bold color
makeup.eyes: bare lids with faint warm shimmer, no heavy eye makeup, no false lashes
makeup.overall: Korean editorial natural — clean, fresh, effortless

ep53_primary.description: Cream / off-white oversized knit sweater, V-neck or slightly off-shoulder
ep53_primary.material: soft chunky knit, cozy texture visible
ep53_primary.accessories: none or minimal — small gold stud earrings only

ep53_alternate.description: Light sage linen blouse, matching brand sage green
ep53_alternate.context: Use if tea scene calls for warmer seasonal look

tea_contemplation.description: Chin resting on interlaced fingers, gazing softly downward-left past camera

holding_teacup.description: Both hands gently cupping a ceramic tea cup at chest level, slight smile, looking at camera

pouring_tea.description: One hand on teapot handle, pouring into cup, focused gaze on tea stream

tea_cheers.description: Raising tea cup slightly toward camera, warm gentle smile, eye contact

smelling_tea.description: Cup held near nose with both hands, eyes closed, peaceful expression, inhaling aroma

seedance_character_prompt._doc: Use this block in all Seedance prompts to maintain character consistency across scenes
seedance_character_prompt.en: Beautiful adult East Asian female, age 23-26. Gentle square face, downturned almond eyes, fluffy natural brows, higher bridge nose, subtle pout lips. Porcelain-clear dewy skin, warm undertone. Long dark chocolate brown hair in loose natural waves, center-parted. Wearing cream off-white oversized knit sweater. Dewy glass-skin makeup, soft peach blush, gradient glossy lips. Korean editorial natural style. No logos, no loud prints.
seedance_character_prompt.zh_cn: 美丽的东亚成年女性，23-26岁。柔和方脸，下垂杏眼，蓬松自然眉毛，高鼻梁，微嘟嘴唇。瓷白水润肌肤，暖色调。深巧克力棕色长发自然卷，中分。穿着米白色宽松针织毛衣。水光肌妆容，淡桃色腮红，渐变水润唇。韩系自然编辑风格。无标志，无花哨图案。

scene_styling_notes.lighting: Warm golden-hour soft light, slight haze, cinematic warmth. Side backlight creating rim glow on hair edge.
scene_styling_notes.color_grading: Warm cream/amber tone, low saturation, slight film grain — matches 時時靜好 brand palette
scene_styling_notes.background_mood: Clean, minimal, warm — wooden textures, natural elements, soft bokeh
scene_styling_notes.camera: Medium close-up to close-up, shallow DOF, slight warm vignette
scene_styling_notes.negative: no cartoon, no anime, no plastic skin, no airbrushed, no cosplay, no harsh lighting, no neon colors, no cluttered background, no text on clothing, no extra people

brand_integration.palette_alignment: cream (#F6F1E7) sweater + warm wood props + sage green accents = brand-native
brand_integration.mascot_coexistence: 茶姐姐 appears in Seedance video scenes; 小靜 appears only in static opening/closing cards. They do NOT appear together in the same frame.
brand_integration.tone: Warm, credible, approachable — NOT influencer-flashy, NOT clinical
